identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Tactical Precision.
anti_patterns: Soft shadows without borders in dark mode

visual_enhancers: Glassmorphism (HUD Style): High blur, low opacity backgrounds, sharp 1px borders
Scanlines: Subtle overlays for video feeds
Neon Accents: Used sparingly for status indicators (Green=Online, Red=Critical)
Monospace Data: All numbers and metrics in JetBrains Mono

headings.usage: Page titles, Critical Alert Headers, KPI Values
headings.instructions: Use uppercase for top-level headers. Tracking tight.

data.usage: Coordinates, Timestamps, Battery levels, Telemetry data

containers.dashboard_panel: h-full rounded-none border border-border/30 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl
containers.floating_hud: absolute z-50 rounded-sm border border-primary/20 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md

responsive_rules.mobile: Stack all panels, prioritize 'Report Incident' and 'Live Map'
responsive_rules.desktop: Map takes 100% background or central 80%. Panels float or dock to sides.

buttons.primary: rounded-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.outline: rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

cards.style: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-md max), 1px border, flat background or subtle glassmorphism.

inputs.style: rounded-sm bg-secondary/50 border-border/50 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary

badges.style: rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase

special.telemetry_gauge: Circular SVG progress rings with monospace values centered.
special.video_feed: Container with corner brackets (corner-only borders) to simulate viewfinder.

rules: Ensure text contrast > 4.5:1 on dark backgrounds
Use Aria labels for all icon-only buttons
Focus states must be high contrast (White ring on dark bg)

instructions_to_main_agent: THEME: Force 'dark' class on the html element or body by default.
MAPS: Use a dark map style (e.g., mapbox://styles/mapbox/dark-v11) or custom dark style.
LAYOUT: On the Dashboard, make the Map the 'Hero'. It should be the background or the largest element. Floating panels for status.
INCIDENT REPORTING: On mobile, make the 'Emergency Type' buttons huge (grid-cols-2, aspect-square) for easy tapping.
TELEMETRY: Update drone positions via WebSocket (mocked or real). Animate the markers smoothly.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for text.
Avoid centered layouts for dashboards; use grids.
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
